raw_consumer_statement: Back in XXXX  2024 made a dispute request against ( XXXX XXXX ) company for an inadequate job. Won that dispute. During this dispute the company ( XXXX XXXX  ) illegally charged my credit card a second time, I notified credit card ( citi cards ) immediately and they assured me they would handle it however, they did not and are now wanting me to pay this illegal charge. I do not owe this money. Citi Cards was wrong I sent paper work requested showing that i was charged twice for same service Sincerely XXXX XXXX
